heading: Step 3: Select the  to restore to.
body:
You can only restore to an Atlas replica set running
Encryption at Rest. The target cluster must run the same or
greater version of MongoDB as the **MongoDB Version** of
the snapshot.

After the restoration procedure, Atlas triggers a key rotation
for MongoDB encryption key. Atlas then encrypts the new
MongoDB encryption keys based on the configured Encryption at
Rest provider for the target cluster.
